Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import pyshex; print\(pyshex.__version__\)" 2>/dev/null || .venv/bin/python -c "import pyshex; print\(pyshex.__version__\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "pyshex not installed")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from shaclex_py.parser.shacl_parser import parse_shacl_file
from shaclex_py.serializer.shacl_serializer import serialize_shacl
schema = parse_shacl_file\('dataset/shacl_yago/Airline.ttl'\)
ttl = serialize_shacl\(schema\)
print\('Has sh:or:', 'sh:or' in ttl\)
for line in ttl.split\('\\n'\):
    if 'or' in line.lower\(\) or 'class' in line.lower\(\):
        print\(line\)
")

ttl = serialize_shacl\(schema\)
print\('Has sh:or:', 'sh:or' in ttl\)
for line in ttl.split\('\\n'\):
    if 'sh:or' in line or 'sh:class' in line:
        print\(line\)
")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c "
from shaclex_py.parser.shacl_parser import parse_shacl_file
from shaclex_py.serializer.shacl_serializer import serialize_shacl
schema = parse_shacl_file\('dataset/shacl_yago/Airline.ttl'\)
ttl = serialize_shacl\(schema\)
print\('Has sh:or:', 'sh:or' in ttl\)
for line in ttl.split\('\\n'\):

Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python3 -c "
from shaclex_py.parser.shacl_parser import parse_shacl_file
from shaclex_py.serializer.shacl_serializer import serialize_shacl
schema = parse_shacl_file\('dataset/shacl_yago/Airline.ttl'\)
ttl = serialize_shacl\(schema\)
print\('Has sh:or:', 'sh:or' in ttl\)
for line in ttl.split\('\\n'\):
    if 'sh:or' in line or 'sh:class' in line:
        print\(repr\(line\)\)
")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m shaclex_py --input-dir dataset/shacl_dbpedia/ --output-dir /tmp/dbpedia_json --direction shacl2json 2>&1 | head -100)
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m shaclex_py --input-dir dataset/shacl_dbpedia/ --output-dir /tmp/dbpedia_shex --direction shacl2shex 2>&1 | head -100)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m shaclex_py --input-dir /tmp/dbpedia_json --output-dir /tmp/dbpedia_json2shacl --direction json2shacl 2>&1 && PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m shaclex_py --input-dir /tmp/dbpedia_json --output-dir /tmp/dbpedia_json2shex --direction json2shex 2>&1)
